412 return true;
413 }
414 return false;
415 });
416 }
417 catch (IOException)
418 {
419 }
420 catch (SecurityException)
421 {
422 }

424 {
425 }
426 return id;
427 }

519 private static string GetTimeZoneDirectory()
520 {

528 text += Path.DirectorySeparatorChar.ToString();

534 public static TimeZoneInfo FindSystemTimeZoneById(string id)
535 {
536 if (string.Equals(id, "UTC", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
537 {
538 return TimeZoneInfo.Utc;
539 }
540 if (id == null)
541 {
542 throw new ArgumentNullException("id");
543 }
544 if (id.Length == 0 || id.Contains('\0'))
545 {
546 throw new TimeZoneNotFoundException(SR.Format("The time zone ID '{0}' was not found on the local computer.", id));
547 }
548 TimeZoneInfo.CachedData cachedData = TimeZoneInfo.s_cachedData;
549 TimeZoneInfo.CachedData cachedData2 = cachedData;
550 TimeZoneInfo timeZoneInfo;
551 Exception ex;
552 TimeZoneInfo.TimeZoneInfoResult timeZoneInfoResult;
553 lock (cachedData2)
554 {
555 timeZoneInfoResult = TimeZoneInfo.TryGetTimeZone(id, false, out timeZoneInfo, out ex, cachedData, true);
556 }
557 if (timeZoneInfoResult == TimeZoneInfo.TimeZoneInfoResult.Success)
558 {
559 return timeZoneInfo;
560 }
561 if (timeZoneInfoResult == TimeZoneInfo.TimeZoneInfoResult.InvalidTimeZoneException)
562 {
563 throw ex;
564 }
565 if (timeZoneInfoResult == TimeZoneInfo.TimeZoneInfoResult.SecurityException)
566 {
567 throw new SecurityException(SR.Format("The time zone ID '{0}' was found on the local computer, but the application does not have permission to read the file.", id), ex);
568 }
569 throw new TimeZoneNotFoundException(SR.Format("The time zone ID '{0}' was not found on the local computer.", id), ex);
570 }

600 private static void TZif_GenerateAdjustmentRule(ref int index, TimeSpan timeZoneBaseUtcOffset, List<TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule> rulesList, DateTime[] dts, byte[] typeOfLocalTime, TimeZoneInfo.TZifType[] transitionTypes, bool[] StandardTime, bool[] GmtTime, string futureTransitionsPosixFormat)
601 {
602 while (index < dts.Length && dts[index] == DateTime.MinValue)

604 index++;

611 TimeSpan timeSpan2 = (tzifType.IsDst ? timeSpan : TimeSpan.Zero);
612 TimeSpan timeSpan3 = (tzifType.IsDst ? TimeSpan.Zero : timeSpan);
613 TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRule = TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule.CreateAdjustmentRule(DateTime.MinValue, dateTime.AddTicks(-1L), timeSpan2, default(TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime), default(TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime), timeSpan3, true);

615 {
616 TimeZoneInfo.NormalizeAdjustmentRuleOffset(timeZoneBaseUtcOffset, ref adjustmentRule);
617 }
618 rulesList.Add(adjustmentRule);
619 }
620 else if (index < dts.Length)
621 {
622 DateTime dateTime2 = dts[index - 1];
623 TimeZoneInfo.TZifType tzifType2 = transitionTypes[(int)typeOfLocalTime[index - 1]];
624 DateTime dateTime3 = dts[index];
625 TimeSpan timeSpan4 = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_CalculateTransitionOffsetFromBase(tzifType2.UtcOffset, timeZoneBaseUtcOffset);
626 TimeSpan timeSpan5 = (tzifType2.IsDst ? timeSpan4 : TimeSpan.Zero);
627 TimeSpan timeSpan6 = (tzifType2.IsDst ? TimeSpan.Zero : timeSpan4);
628 TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime transitionTime;
629 if (tzifType2.IsDst)
630 {
631 transitionTime = TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime.CreateFixedDateRule(DateTime.MinValue.AddMilliseconds(2.0), 1, 1);
632 }
633 else
634 {
635 transitionTime = default(TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime);
636 }
637 TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRule2 = TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule.CreateAdjustmentRule(dateTime2, dateTime3.AddTicks(-1L), timeSpan5, transitionTime, default(TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime), timeSpan6, true);
638 if (!TimeZoneInfo.IsValidAdjustmentRuleOffest(timeZoneBaseUtcOffset, adjustmentRule2))
639 {
640 TimeZoneInfo.NormalizeAdjustmentRuleOffset(timeZoneBaseUtcOffset, ref adjustmentRule2);
641 }
642 rulesList.Add(adjustmentRule2);
643 }
644 else
645 {
646 DateTime dateTime4 = dts[index - 1];
647 if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(futureTransitionsPosixFormat))
648 {
649 TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRule3 = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_CreateAdjustmentRuleForPosixFormat(futureTransitionsPosixFormat, dateTime4, timeZoneBaseUtcOffset);
650 if (adjustmentRule3 != null)
651 {
652 if (!TimeZoneInfo.IsValidAdjustmentRuleOffest(timeZoneBaseUtcOffset, adjustmentRule3))
653 {
654 TimeZoneInfo.NormalizeAdjustmentRuleOffset(timeZoneBaseUtcOffset, ref adjustmentRule3);
655 }
656 rulesList.Add(adjustmentRule3);
657 }
658 }
659 else
660 {
661 TimeZoneInfo.TZifType tzifType3 = transitionTypes[(int)typeOfLocalTime[index - 1]];
662 TimeSpan timeSpan7 = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_CalculateTransitionOffsetFromBase(tzifType3.UtcOffset, timeZoneBaseUtcOffset);
663 TimeSpan timeSpan8 = (tzifType3.IsDst ? timeSpan7 : TimeSpan.Zero);
664 TimeSpan timeSpan9 = (tzifType3.IsDst ? TimeSpan.Zero : timeSpan7);

677 private static TimeSpan TZif_CalculateTransitionOffsetFromBase(TimeSpan transitionOffset, TimeSpan timeZoneBaseUtcOffset)
678 {
679 TimeSpan timeSpan = transitionOffset - timeZoneBaseUtcOffset;
680 if (timeSpan.Ticks % 600000000L != 0L)
681 {
682 timeSpan = new TimeSpan(timeSpan.Hours, timeSpan.Minutes, 0);
683 }
684 return timeSpan;
685 }

687 // Token: 0x06000F70 RID: 3952 RVA: 0x0003F008 File Offset: 0x0003D208
688 private static TimeZoneInfo.TZifType TZif_GetEarlyDateTransitionType(TimeZoneInfo.TZifType[] transitionTypes)
689 {

691 {
692 if (!tzifType.IsDst)
693 {
694 return tzifType;
695 }
696 }
697 if (transitionTypes.Length != 0)
698 {
699 return transitionTypes[0];
700 }
701 throw new InvalidTimeZoneException("There are no ttinfo structures in the tzfile. At least one ttinfo structure is required in order to construct a TimeZoneInfo object.");
702 }

705 private static TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule TZif_CreateAdjustmentRuleForPosixFormat(string posixFormat, DateTime startTransitionDate, TimeSpan timeZoneBaseUtcOffset)
706 {

708 string text2;
709 string text3;
710 string text4;
711 string text5;
712 string text6;
713 string text7;
714 string text8;

716 {
717 TimeSpan? timeSpan = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParseOffsetString(text2);

719 {
720 TimeSpan timeSpan2 = timeSpan.Value.Negate();

722 if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(text3))
723 {
724 TimeSpan? timeSpan3 = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParseOffsetString(text4);
725 TimeSpan timeSpan4;
726 if (timeSpan3 == null)
727 {
728 timeSpan4 = new TimeSpan(1, 0, 0);
729 }
730 else
731 {
732 timeSpan4 = timeSpan3.Value.Negate();

736 TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime transitionTime = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_CreateTransitionTimeFromPosixRule(text5, text6);
737 TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime transitionTime2 = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_CreateTransitionTimeFromPosixRule(text7, text8);

739 }
740 return TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule.CreateAdjustmentRule(startTransitionDate, DateTime.MaxValue, TimeSpan.Zero, default(TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime), default(TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime), timeSpan2, true);

746 // Token: 0x06000F72 RID: 3954 RVA: 0x0003F148 File Offset: 0x0003D348
747 private static TimeSpan? TZif_ParseOffsetString(string offset)
748 {
749 TimeSpan? timeSpan = null;
750 if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(offset))
751 {
752 bool flag = offset[0] == '-';
753 if (flag || offset[0] == '+')
754 {
755 offset = offset.Substring(1);
756 }
757 int num;
758 TimeSpan timeSpan2;
759 if (int.TryParse(offset, out num))
760 {
761 timeSpan = new TimeSpan?(new TimeSpan(num, 0, 0));
762 }
763 else if (TimeSpan.TryParseExact(offset, "g", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out timeSpan2))
764 {
765 timeSpan = new TimeSpan?(timeSpan2);
766 }
767 if (timeSpan != null && flag)
768 {
769 timeSpan = new TimeSpan?(timeSpan.Value.Negate());
770 }
771 }
772 return timeSpan;
773 }

775 // Token: 0x06000F73 RID: 3955 RVA: 0x0003F1E4 File Offset: 0x0003D3E4
776 private static DateTime ParseTimeOfDay(string time)
777 {
778 TimeSpan? timeSpan = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParseOffsetString(time);
779 DateTime dateTime;
780 if (timeSpan != null)
781 {
782 timeSpan = new TimeSpan?(new TimeSpan(timeSpan.Value.Hours, timeSpan.Value.Minutes, timeSpan.Value.Seconds));
783 if (timeSpan.Value < TimeSpan.Zero)
784 {
785 dateTime = new DateTime(1, 1, 2, 0, 0, 0);
786 }
787 else
788 {
789 dateTime = new DateTime(1, 1, 1, 0, 0, 0);
790 }
791 dateTime += timeSpan.Value;
792 }
793 else
794 {
795 dateTime = new DateTime(1, 1, 1, 2, 0, 0);
796 }
797 return dateTime;
798 }

800 // Token: 0x06000F74 RID: 3956 RVA: 0x0003F288 File Offset: 0x0003D488
801 private static TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime TZif_CreateTransitionTimeFromPosixRule(string date, string time)
802 {
803 if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(date))
804 {
805 return default(TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime);
806 }
807 if (date[0] == 'M')
808 {
809 int num;
810 int num2;
811 DayOfWeek dayOfWeek;
812 if (!TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParseMDateRule(date, out num, out num2, out dayOfWeek))
813 {
814 throw new InvalidTimeZoneException(SR.Format("'{0}' is not a valid POSIX-TZ-environment-variable MDate rule. A valid rule has the format 'Mm.w.d'.", date));
815 }
816 return TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime.CreateFloatingDateRule(TimeZoneInfo.ParseTimeOfDay(time), num, num2, dayOfWeek);
817 }
818 else
819 {
820 if (date[0] != 'J')
821 {
822 throw new InvalidTimeZoneException("Julian n day in POSIX strings is not supported.");
823 }
824 int num3;
825 int num4;
826 TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParseJulianDay(date, out num3, out num4);
827 return TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime.CreateFixedDateRule(TimeZoneInfo.ParseTimeOfDay(time), num3, num4);
828 }
829 }

831 // Token: 0x06000F75 RID: 3957 RVA: 0x0003F310 File Offset: 0x0003D510
832 private static void TZif_ParseJulianDay(string date, out int month, out int day)
833 {
834 month = (day = 0);
835 int num = 1;
836 if (num >= date.Length || date[num] - '0' > '\t')
837 {
838 throw new InvalidTimeZoneException("Invalid Julian day in POSIX strings.");
839 }
840 int num2 = 0;
841 do
842 {
843 num2 = num2 * 10 + (int)(date[num] - '0');
844 num++;
845 }
846 while (num < date.Length && date[num] - '0' <= '\t');
847 int[] daysToMonth = GregorianCalendarHelper.DaysToMonth365;
848 if (num2 == 0 || num2 > daysToMonth[daysToMonth.Length - 1])
849 {
850 throw new InvalidTimeZoneException("Invalid Julian day in POSIX strings.");
851 }
852 int num3 = 1;
853 while (num3 < daysToMonth.Length && num2 > daysToMonth[num3])
854 {
855 num3++;
856 }
857 month = num3;
858 day = num2 - daysToMonth[num3 - 1];
859 }
860
861 // Token: 0x06000F76 RID: 3958 RVA: 0x0003F3B8 File Offset: 0x0003D5B8
862 private static bool TZif_ParseMDateRule(string dateRule, out int month, out int week, out DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)
863 {
864 if (dateRule[0] == 'M')
865 {
866 int num = dateRule.IndexOf('.');
867 if (num > 0)
868 {
869 int num2 = dateRule.IndexOf('.', num + 1);
870 int num3;
871 if (num2 > 0 && int.TryParse(dateRule.AsSpan(1, num - 1), out month) && int.TryParse(dateRule.AsSpan(num + 1, num2 - num - 1), out week) && int.TryParse(dateRule.AsSpan(num2 + 1), out num3))
872 {
873 dayOfWeek = (DayOfWeek)num3;
874 return true;
875 }
876 }
877 }
878 month = 0;
879 week = 0;
880 dayOfWeek = DayOfWeek.Sunday;
881 return false;
882 }

884 // Token: 0x06000F77 RID: 3959 RVA: 0x0003F438 File Offset: 0x0003D638
885 private static bool TZif_ParsePosixFormat(string posixFormat, out string standardName, out string standardOffset, out string daylightSavingsName, out string daylightSavingsOffset, out string start, out string startTime, out string end, out string endTime)
886 {
887 standardName = null;
888 standardOffset = null;
889 daylightSavingsName = null;
890 daylightSavingsOffset = null;
891 start = null;
892 startTime = null;
893 end = null;
894 endTime = null;
895 int num = 0;
896 standardName = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParsePosixName(posixFormat, ref num);
897 standardOffset = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParsePosixOffset(posixFormat, ref num);
898 daylightSavingsName = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParsePosixName(posixFormat, ref num);
899 if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(daylightSavingsName))
900 {
901 daylightSavingsOffset = TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParsePosixOffset(posixFormat, ref num);
902 if (num < posixFormat.Length && posixFormat[num] == ',')
903 {
904 num++;
905 TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParsePosixDateTime(posixFormat, ref num, out start, out startTime);
906 if (num < posixFormat.Length && posixFormat[num] == ',')
907 {
908 num++;
909 TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ParsePosixDateTime(posixFormat, ref num, out end, out endTime);
910 }
911 }
912 }
913 return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(standardName) && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(standardOffset);
914 }

921 index++;

1165 // Token: 0x06000F8A RID: 3978 RVA: 0x0003FA14 File Offset: 0x0003DC14
1166 public TimeSpan[] GetAmbiguousTimeOffsets(DateTimeOffset dateTimeOffset)
1167 {
1168 if (!this.SupportsDaylightSavingTime)
1169 {
1170 throw new ArgumentException("The supplied DateTimeOffset is not in an ambiguous time range.", "dateTimeOffset");
1171 }
1172 DateTime dateTime = TimeZoneInfo.ConvertTime(dateTimeOffset, this).DateTime;
1173 bool flag = false;
1174 int? num;
1175 TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets = this.GetAdjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets(dateTime, out num);
1176 if (adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets != null && adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.HasDaylightSaving)
1177 {
1178 DaylightTimeStruct daylightTime = this.GetDaylightTime(dateTime.Year, adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets, num);
1179 flag = TimeZoneInfo.GetIsAmbiguousTime(dateTime, adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets, daylightTime);
1180 }
1181 if (!flag)
1182 {
1183 throw new ArgumentException("The supplied DateTimeOffset is not in an ambiguous time range.", "dateTimeOffset");
1184 }
1185 TimeSpan[] array = new TimeSpan[2];
1186 TimeSpan timeSpan = this._baseUtcOffset + adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.BaseUtcOffsetDelta;
1187 if (adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.DaylightDelta > TimeSpan.Zero)
1188 {
1189 array[0] = timeSpan;
1190 array[1] = timeSpan + adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.DaylightDelta;
1191 }
1192 else
1193 {
1194 array[0] = timeSpan + adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.DaylightDelta;
1195 array[1] = timeSpan;
1196 }
1197 return array;
1198 }
1199
1200 // Token: 0x06000F8B RID: 3979 RVA: 0x0003FB00 File Offset: 0x0003DD00
1201 public TimeSpan[] GetAmbiguousTimeOffsets(DateTime dateTime)
1202 {
1203 if (!this.SupportsDaylightSavingTime)
1204 {
1205 throw new ArgumentException("The supplied DateTime is not in an ambiguous time range.", "dateTime");
1206 }
1207 DateTime dateTime2;
1208 if (dateTime.Kind == DateTimeKind.Local)
1209 {
1210 TimeZoneInfo.CachedData cachedData = TimeZoneInfo.s_cachedData;
1211 dateTime2 = TimeZoneInfo.ConvertTime(dateTime, cachedData.Local, this, TimeZoneInfoOptions.None, cachedData);
1212 }
1213 else if (dateTime.Kind == DateTimeKind.Utc)
1214 {
1215 TimeZoneInfo.CachedData cachedData2 = TimeZoneInfo.s_cachedData;
1216 dateTime2 = TimeZoneInfo.ConvertTime(dateTime, TimeZoneInfo.s_utcTimeZone, this, TimeZoneInfoOptions.None, cachedData2);
1217 }
1218 else
1219 {
1220 dateTime2 = dateTime;
1221 }
1222 bool flag = false;
1223 int? num;
1224 TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets = this.GetAdjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets(dateTime2, out num);
1225 if (adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets != null && adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.HasDaylightSaving)
1226 {
1227 DaylightTimeStruct daylightTime = this.GetDaylightTime(dateTime2.Year, adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets, num);
1228 flag = TimeZoneInfo.GetIsAmbiguousTime(dateTime2, adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets, daylightTime);
1229 }
1230 if (!flag)
1231 {
1232 throw new ArgumentException("The supplied DateTime is not in an ambiguous time range.", "dateTime");
1233 }
1234 TimeSpan[] array = new TimeSpan[2];
1235 TimeSpan timeSpan = this._baseUtcOffset + adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.BaseUtcOffsetDelta;
1236 if (adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.DaylightDelta > TimeSpan.Zero)
1237 {
1238 array[0] = timeSpan;
1239 array[1] = timeSpan + adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.DaylightDelta;
1240 }
1241 else
1242 {
1243 array[0] = timeSpan + adjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets.DaylightDelta;
1244 array[1] = timeSpan;
1245 }
1246 return array;
1247 }
1248
1249 // Token: 0x06000F8C RID: 3980 RVA: 0x0003FC24 File Offset: 0x0003DE24
1250 private TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule GetAdjustmentRuleForAmbiguousOffsets(DateTime adjustedTime, out int? ruleIndex)
1251 {
1252 TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRuleForTime = this.GetAdjustmentRuleForTime(adjustedTime, out ruleIndex);
1253 if (adjustmentRuleForTime != null && adjustmentRuleForTime.NoDaylightTransitions && !adjustmentRuleForTime.HasDaylightSaving)
1254 {
1255 return this.GetPreviousAdjustmentRule(adjustmentRuleForTime, ruleIndex);
1256 }
1257 return adjustmentRuleForTime;

1477 {
1478 return DateTimeOffset.MaxValue;

1481 {
1482 return new DateTimeOffset(num, utcOffsetFromUtc);

1484 return DateTimeOffset.MinValue;

1516 private static DateTime ConvertTime(DateTime dateTime, TimeZoneInfo sourceTimeZone, TimeZoneInfo destinationTimeZone, TimeZoneInfoOptions flags, TimeZoneInfo.CachedData cachedData)
1517 {

1519 {
1520 throw new ArgumentNullException("sourceTimeZone");
1521 }
1522 if (destinationTimeZone == null)
1523 {
1524 throw new ArgumentNullException("destinationTimeZone");
1525 }
1526 DateTimeKind correspondingKind = cachedData.GetCorrespondingKind(sourceTimeZone);
1527 if ((flags & TimeZoneInfoOptions.NoThrowOnInvalidTime) == (TimeZoneInfoOptions)0 && dateTime.Kind != DateTimeKind.Unspecified && dateTime.Kind != correspondingKind)
1528 {
1529 throw new ArgumentException("The conversion could not be completed because the supplied DateTime did not have the Kind property set correctly. For example, when the Kind property is DateTimeKind.Local, the source time zone must be TimeZoneInfo.Local.", "sourceTimeZone");
1530 }
1531 int? num;

1533 TimeSpan timeSpan = sourceTimeZone.BaseUtcOffset;
1534 if (adjustmentRuleForTime != null)
1535 {
1536 timeSpan += adjustmentRuleForTime.BaseUtcOffsetDelta;
1537 if (adjustmentRuleForTime.HasDaylightSaving)
1538 {
1539 DaylightTimeStruct daylightTime = sourceTimeZone.GetDaylightTime(dateTime.Year, adjustmentRuleForTime, num);

1541 {
1542 throw new ArgumentException("The supplied DateTime represents an invalid time. For example, when the clock is adjusted forward, any time in the period that is skipped is invalid.", "dateTime");
1543 }
1544 bool isDaylightSavings = TimeZoneInfo.GetIsDaylightSavings(dateTime, adjustmentRuleForTime, daylightTime, flags);
1545 timeSpan += (isDaylightSavings ? adjustmentRuleForTime.DaylightDelta : TimeSpan.Zero);
1546 }
1547 }
1548 DateTimeKind correspondingKind2 = cachedData.GetCorrespondingKind(destinationTimeZone);
1549 if (dateTime.Kind != DateTimeKind.Unspecified && correspondingKind != DateTimeKind.Unspecified && correspondingKind == correspondingKind2)
1550 {
1551 return dateTime;
1552 }
1553 bool flag;
1554 DateTime dateTime2 = TimeZoneInfo.ConvertUtcToTimeZone(dateTime.Ticks - timeSpan.Ticks, destinationTimeZone, out flag);
1555 if (correspondingKind2 == DateTimeKind.Local)
1556 {
1557 return new DateTime(dateTime2.Ticks, DateTimeKind.Local, flag);
1558 }
1559 return new DateTime(dateTime2.Ticks, correspondingKind2);
1560 }

2393 {
2394 value = null;
2395 return timeZoneInfoResult;
2396 }
2397 if (cachedData._systemTimeZones == null)
2398 {
2399 cachedData._systemTimeZones = new Dictionary<string, TimeZoneInfo>(StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
2400 }
2401 cachedData._systemTimeZones.Add(id, timeZoneInfo);
2402 if (dstDisabled && timeZoneInfo._supportsDaylightSavingTime)
2403 {
2404 value = TimeZoneInfo.CreateCustomTimeZone(timeZoneInfo._id, timeZoneInfo._baseUtcOffset, timeZoneInfo._displayName, timeZoneInfo._standardDisplayName);
2405 return timeZoneInfoResult;
2406 }
2407 value = new TimeZoneInfo(timeZoneInfo._id, timeZoneInfo._baseUtcOffset, timeZoneInfo._displayName, timeZoneInfo._standardDisplayName, timeZoneInfo._daylightDisplayName, timeZoneInfo._adjustmentRules, false);
2408 return timeZoneInfoResult;
2409 }

2411 // Token: 0x06000FCF RID: 4047 RVA: 0x000415D8 File Offset: 0x0003F7D8
2412 private static void ValidateTimeZoneInfo(string id, TimeSpan baseUtcOffset, TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule[] adjustmentRules, out bool adjustmentRulesSupportDst)
2413 {
2414 if (id == null)
2415 {
2416 throw new ArgumentNullException("id");
2417 }
2418 if (id.Length == 0)
2419 {
2420 throw new ArgumentException(SR.Format("The specified ID parameter '{0}' is not supported.", id), "id");
2421 }
2422 if (TimeZoneInfo.UtcOffsetOutOfRange(baseUtcOffset))
2423 {
2424 throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException("baseUtcOffset", "The TimeSpan parameter must be within plus or minus 14.0 hours.");
2425 }
2426 if (baseUtcOffset.Ticks % 600000000L != 0L)
2427 {
2428 throw new ArgumentException("The TimeSpan parameter cannot be specified more precisely than whole minutes.", "baseUtcOffset");
2429 }
2430 adjustmentRulesSupportDst = false;
2431 if (adjustmentRules != null && adjustmentRules.Length != 0)
2432 {
2433 adjustmentRulesSupportDst = true;
2434 TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRule = null;
2435 for (int i = 0; i < adjustmentRules.Length; i++)
2436 {
2437 TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRule2 = adjustmentRule;
2438 adjustmentRule = adjustmentRules[i];
2439 if (adjustmentRule == null)
2440 {
2441 throw new InvalidTimeZoneException("The AdjustmentRule array cannot contain null elements.");
2442 }
2443 if (!TimeZoneInfo.IsValidAdjustmentRuleOffest(baseUtcOffset, adjustmentRule))
2444 {
2445 throw new InvalidTimeZoneException("The sum of the BaseUtcOffset and DaylightDelta properties must within plus or minus 14.0 hours.");
2446 }
2447 if (adjustmentRule2 != null && adjustmentRule.DateStart <= adjustmentRule2.DateEnd)
2448 {
2449 throw new InvalidTimeZoneException("The elements of the AdjustmentRule array must be in chronological order and must not overlap.");
2450 }
2451 }
2452 }
2453 }
2454
2455 // Token: 0x06000FD0 RID: 4048 RVA: 0x000416B1 File Offset: 0x0003F8B1
2456 internal static bool UtcOffsetOutOfRange(TimeSpan offset)
2457 {
2458 return offset < TimeZoneInfo.MinOffset || offset > TimeZoneInfo.MaxOffset;
2459 }
2460
2461 // Token: 0x06000FD1 RID: 4049 RVA: 0x000416CD File Offset: 0x0003F8CD
2462 private static TimeSpan GetUtcOffset(TimeSpan baseUtcOffset, TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRule)
2463 {

2466
2467 // Token: 0x06000FD2 RID: 4050 RVA: 0x000416F5 File Offset: 0x0003F8F5

2471 }
2472
2473 // Token: 0x06000FD3 RID: 4051 RVA: 0x00041708 File Offset: 0x0003F908
2474 private static void NormalizeAdjustmentRuleOffset(TimeSpan baseUtcOffset, ref TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRule)
2475 {
2476 TimeSpan utcOffset = TimeZoneInfo.GetUtcOffset(baseUtcOffset, adjustmentRule);
2477 TimeSpan timeSpan = TimeSpan.Zero;
2478 if (utcOffset > TimeZoneInfo.MaxOffset)
2479 {
2480 timeSpan = TimeZoneInfo.MaxOffset - utcOffset;
2481 }
2482 else if (utcOffset < TimeZoneInfo.MinOffset)
2483 {
2484 timeSpan = TimeZoneInfo.MinOffset - utcOffset;
2485 }
2486 if (timeSpan != TimeSpan.Zero)
2487 {
2488 adjustmentRule = TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule.CreateAdjustmentRule(adjustmentRule.DateStart, adjustmentRule.DateEnd, adjustmentRule.DaylightDelta, adjustmentRule.DaylightTransitionStart, adjustmentRule.DaylightTransitionEnd, adjustmentRule.BaseUtcOffsetDelta + timeSpan, adjustmentRule.NoDaylightTransitions);

2490 }

2688 // Token: 0x06000FE4 RID: 4068 RVA: 0x00041B28 File Offset: 0x0003FD28
2689 private static void ValidateAdjustmentRule(DateTime dateStart, DateTime dateEnd, TimeSpan daylightDelta, TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime daylightTransitionStart, TimeZoneInfo.TransitionTime daylightTransitionEnd, bool noDaylightTransitions)
2690 {

2692 {

2694 }

2698 }
2699 if (daylightTransitionStart.Equals(daylightTransitionEnd) && !noDaylightTransitions)
2700 {
2701 throw new ArgumentException("The DaylightTransitionStart property must not equal the DaylightTransitionEnd property.", "daylightTransitionEnd");
2702 }
2703 if (dateStart > dateEnd)
2704 {
2705 throw new ArgumentException("The DateStart property must come before the DateEnd property.", "dateStart");
2706 }
2707 if (daylightDelta.TotalHours < -23.0 || daylightDelta.TotalHours > 14.0)
2708 {
2709 throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException("daylightDelta", daylightDelta, "The TimeSpan parameter must be within plus or minus 14.0 hours.");
2710 }
2711 if (daylightDelta.Ticks % 600000000L != 0L)
2712 {
2713 throw new ArgumentException("The TimeSpan parameter cannot be specified more precisely than whole minutes.", "daylightDelta");
2714 }
2715 if (dateStart != DateTime.MinValue && dateStart.Kind == DateTimeKind.Unspecified && dateStart.TimeOfDay != TimeSpan.Zero)
2716 {
2717 throw new ArgumentException("The supplied DateTime includes a TimeOfDay setting. This is not supported.", "dateStart");
2718 }
2719 if (dateEnd != DateTime.MaxValue && dateEnd.Kind == DateTimeKind.Unspecified && dateEnd.TimeOfDay != TimeSpan.Zero)
2720 {

2803 // Token: 0x06000FE8 RID: 4072 RVA: 0x00041E8C File Offset: 0x0004008C

2808 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2809 stringBuilder.Append(zone.BaseUtcOffset.TotalMinutes.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
2810 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2811 TimeZoneInfo.StringSerializer.SerializeSubstitute(zone.DisplayName, stringBuilder);
2812 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2813 TimeZoneInfo.StringSerializer.SerializeSubstitute(zone.StandardName, stringBuilder);
2814 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2815 TimeZoneInfo.StringSerializer.SerializeSubstitute(zone.DaylightName, stringBuilder);
2816 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2817 foreach (TimeZoneInfo.AdjustmentRule adjustmentRule in zone.GetAdjustmentRules())
2818 {
2819 stringBuilder.Append('[');
2820 stringBuilder.Append(adjustmentRule.DateStart.ToString("MM:dd:yyyy", DateTimeFormatInfo.InvariantInfo));
2821 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2822 stringBuilder.Append(adjustmentRule.DateEnd.ToString("MM:dd:yyyy", DateTimeFormatInfo.InvariantInfo));
2823 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2824 stringBuilder.Append(adjustmentRule.DaylightDelta.TotalMinutes.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
2825 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2826 TimeZoneInfo.StringSerializer.SerializeTransitionTime(adjustmentRule.DaylightTransitionStart, stringBuilder);
2827 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2828 TimeZoneInfo.StringSerializer.SerializeTransitionTime(adjustmentRule.DaylightTransitionEnd, stringBuilder);
2829 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2830 if (adjustmentRule.BaseUtcOffsetDelta != TimeSpan.Zero)
2831 {
2832 stringBuilder.Append(adjustmentRule.BaseUtcOffsetDelta.TotalMinutes.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
2833 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2834 }
2835 if (adjustmentRule.NoDaylightTransitions)
2836 {
2837 stringBuilder.Append('1');
2838 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2839 }
2840 stringBuilder.Append(']');
2841 }
2842 stringBuilder.Append(';');
2843 return StringBuilderCache.GetStringAndRelease(stringBuilder);
2844 }

2893 // Token: 0x06000FEC RID: 4076 RVA: 0x0004216C File Offset: 0x0004036C

2899 serializedText.Append(time.TimeOfDay.ToString("HH:mm:ss.FFF", DateTimeFormatInfo.InvariantInfo));
2900 serializedText.Append(';');
2901 serializedText.Append(time.Month.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
2902 serializedText.Append(';');
2903 if (time.IsFixedDateRule)
2904 {
2905 serializedText.Append(time.Day.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
2906 serializedText.Append(';');
2907 }
2908 else
2909 {
2910 serializedText.Append(time.Week.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
2911 serializedText.Append(';');
2912 serializedText.Append(((int)time.DayOfWeek).ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture));
2913 serializedText.Append(';');
2914 }
2915 serializedText.Append(']');
2916 }

3426 // Token: 0x06001004 RID: 4100 RVA: 0x00042B8C File Offset: 0x00040D8C
3427 private static void ValidateTransitionTime(DateTime timeOfDay, int month, int week, int day, DayOfWeek dayOfWeek)
3428 {
3429 if (timeOfDay.Kind != DateTimeKind.Unspecified)
3430 {
3431 throw new ArgumentException("The supplied DateTime must have the Kind property set to DateTimeKind.Unspecified.", "timeOfDay");
3432 }
3433 if (month < 1 || month > 12)
3434 {
3435 throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException("month", "The Month parameter must be in the range 1 through 12.");
3436 }
3437 if (day < 1 || day > 31)
3438 {
3439 throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException("day", "The Day parameter must be in the range 1 through 31.");
3440 }
3441 if (week < 1 || week > 5)
3442 {
3443 throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException("week", "The Week parameter must be in the range 1 through 5.");
3444 }
3445 if (dayOfWeek < DayOfWeek.Sunday || dayOfWeek > DayOfWeek.Saturday)
3446 {
3447 throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException("dayOfWeek", "The DayOfWeek enumeration must be in the range 0 through 6.");
3448 }
3449 int num;
3450 int num2;
3451 int num3;
3452 timeOfDay.GetDatePart(out num, out num2, out num3);
3453 if (num != 1 || num2 != 1 || num3 != 1 || timeOfDay.Ticks % 10000L != 0L)
3454 {
3455 throw new ArgumentException("The supplied DateTime must have the Year, Month, and Day properties set to 1. The time cannot be specified more precisely than whole milliseconds.", "timeOfDay");
3456 }
3457 }

3557 throw new ArgumentException("bad data", "data");

3559 this.Magic = (uint)TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ToInt32(data, index);
3560 if (this.Magic != 1415211366U)
3561 {

3563 }
3564 byte b = data[index + 4];
3565 this.Version = ((b == 50) ? TimeZoneInfo.TZVersion.V2 : ((b == 51) ? TimeZoneInfo.TZVersion.V3 : TimeZoneInfo.TZVersion.V1));
3566 this.IsGmtCount = (uint)TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ToInt32(data, index + 20);
3567 this.IsStdCount = (uint)TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ToInt32(data, index + 24);
3568 this.LeapCount = (uint)TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ToInt32(data, index + 28);

3570 this.TypeCount = (uint)TimeZoneInfo.TZif_ToInt32(data, index + 36);
